name: promptcraft-mcp
description: Prompt Engineering MCP: the vendor-neutral craft of reliable LLM output. Techniques (zero/few-shot, chain-of-thought, self-consistency, role, decomposition, ReAct/tree-of-thought/meta), structure (prompt anatomy, XML/delimiter structuring, output formatting, context & example selection), and reliability (iterating & evaluating, anti-patterns, robustness & prompt injection, prompting reasoning models). explain_topic/build_prompt/improve_prompt/myth_vs_reality plus check_practice → practice_verdict for model-specific guidance. Owns technique; defers OpenAI-specific prompt shape to openai, prompt-in-loop to loop, prompt-vs-RAG-vs-fine-tune to aiforge. Runs as an asset under orchestrator-mcp.
